full_text:
Hua Tan иҸҜиӯҡ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Tan (иҸҜиӯҡ). Wu minister during its wane. Younger son of Hua Rong. Hua Tan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
